title: RESCM L2-relaxation vs Liao-Shi-Zheng's scmrelax (toy factor panel, matched tau)
paper: Liao, Wei, Zhentao Shi & Yapeng Zheng (2026), "A Relaxation Approach to Synthetic Control" (arXiv 2508.01793)
reference_impl: scmrelax.L2RelaxationCV (packaged Relaxed_SC; github.com/metricshilab/scmrelax = github.com/YapengZheng/Relaxed_SC), MOSEK routed to CLARABEL, live run
